description: The business logic in src/routes/users.js is inline in the route handlers (direct db access, validation logic). Extract it into a src/services/users.js service module. The route handlers should delegate to the service. Behavior must not change.
expected_behavior: A new src/services/users.js exists with functions findAll(), findById(id), create({ name, email }). Route handlers call these functions. All existing tests still pass.

success_criteria.description: Output references a new src/services/users.js file
Refactored route handler imports from the service module

success_criteria.rubric: Does the refactored code preserve the exact same HTTP behavior (same status codes, same response shapes, same validation rules) without any behavior changes?

success_criteria.description: Service module contains named functions for each operation
success_criteria.rubric: Does the proposed service module expose clearly named functions (findAll, findById, create or equivalent) that encapsulate the business logic?
